aries:
♈ Aries

🔥 Energy: Focused but slightly tense

💼 Career: Pressure handle karna hoga, result mil sakta hai

❤️ Love: Short temper se issue create ho sakta hai

💰 Money: Expense control zaruri hai

🧘 Advice: Patience practice karo

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Control andar se aata hai, bahar se nahi

♉ Taurus

🔥 Energy: Stable aur relaxed

❤️ Love: Comfort aur trust deepen hoga

💰 Money: Financial stability strong

🧘 Advice: Change se daro mat

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Growth comfort zone ke bahar hoti hai
